violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
The handwashing sink in the restroom was lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The presence of small flies and rodents are not controlled as evidenced by live small flies and droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the back and front, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
Inspector observed single service items stored on the floor in the back storage room. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelves in front service area and shelf under food prep table in the back kitchen area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, droppings and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
The toilet room is lacking receptacle with a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen AND basement areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
Chest Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The (ceilings) in the (back kitchen) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
